calendar.matters:
Petition To Invalidate Third Amendment And Restatement Dated May 7, 2010 Of The Lawrence G Bedini 1999 Living Trust For Lack Of Capacity And Undue Inf
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Off Calendar

Petition To Invalidate Third Amendment And Restatement Dated May 7, 2010 Of The Lawrence G Bedini 1999 Living Trust For Lack Of Capacity And Undue Inf
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl for Anthony Ponticello. Charles Wolff for Thomas Elliot.

The Parties agreed to participate in meditation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 8, 2010. The matter was continued to October 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
